allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.scripts,null,2\)\); console.log\('---deps for prisma---'\); console.log\('prisma:', \(p.devDependencies||{}\).prisma, '@prisma/client:', \(p.dependencies||{}\)['@prisma/client']\);")

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,StartTime,@{N='Cmd';E={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-Table -Wrap)
